word: G5082 - τηλικοῦτος - tēlikoûtos - tay-lik-oo'-tos - So great

sections.paragraph:
τηλικοῦτος τηλικαύτη - tēlikoutos tēlikautē - tay-lik-oo'-tos, tay-lik-ow'-tay)

Masculine and feminine; from a compound of G3588 with G2245 and G3778; such as this, that is, (in [figuratively] magnitude) so vast: - so great, so mighty.
